refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs targeting key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency and task execution) allows clearer design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and compare against the target; verify sub-FRs by monitoring equipment utilization and task completion rates.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize productive work time.
FR2: Enhance task execution efficiency to meet or exceed productivity targets.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize operational efficiency.
DP2: Integrate task scheduling and monitoring system to optimize task execution.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both operational and task execution efficiency.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling modules may introduce coupling.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 and DP2 are logically distinct but must interface; coupling is manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate telemetry data for control and scheduling.
Risk that task scheduling delays could reduce operational efficiency.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor interface definitions closely to minimize coupling; consider modular separation in IM.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration including vehicle control and task scheduling.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time data from Vehicle to NGHE Solution and feedback control signals.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task assignments from external systems or operators.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as it integrates both DP1 and DP2; low diffusion risk.
Contains vehicle control but less suitable for task scheduling DP.
Limited relevance to productivity DP; higher diffusion risk if used.
Not relevant for productivity DP; high diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing productivity-related DPs in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and improves integration.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module may affect maintainability.
Interface management critical to avoid coupling spillover.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider sub-modularization within NGHE Solution if complexity grows; enforce strict interface contracts.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Refined FRs are well matched by selected DPs addressing operational and task execution efficiency.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk by centralizing DPs in NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as best IM boundary.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry and tasking interface data.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of productivity-related functions to NGHE Solution module.

recommended_revisions: Monitor complexity within NGHE Solution IM to avoid maintainability issues.
Define clear interface contracts for Telemetry and Tasking.

decision.justification: Current level of functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, feasible, and meet containment criteria with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational efficiency to maximize productive work time.
FR2: Enhance task execution efficiency to meet or exceed productivity targets.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely.
Tasking interface supports required scheduling commands.
open_risks: Complexity management within NGHE Solution module.
Potential coupling between vehicle control and task scheduling.
evidence_needed: Operational data demonstrating productivity target achievement.
Interface performance metrics for Telemetry and Tasking.
